title: 5 silly earnings season stock price moves! Sometimes Mr. Market gets it wrong come earnings season!

Traditional telecom carriers such as AT&T and Verizon are rapidly building out their fiber networks to package internet with wireless plans at a discount, which is appealing to high-value customers in urban and suburban markets.  AT&T has been aggressively expanding its fiber build and aims to reach more than 60 million fiber locations by the end of 2030, powered by the acquisition of Lumen's mass markets fiber business.
